overall.description: A stationary view of a medieval tavern interior with Gothic stone architecture, wooden furniture, and atmospheric candlelight. A female NPC in a green dress walks through the hall from background to foreground. High-quality game engine footage resembling Unreal Engine 5 rendering.

segments.scene_description: A stationary cinematic view of a medieval tavern interior featuring Gothic stone architecture with vaulted ceilings, wooden furniture, and warm candlelight. Patrons sit at tables throughout the space. A woman in a green dress walks through the hall from the background toward the right foreground, passing between the wooden tables.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a stationary cinematic perspective of a medieval tavern interior as a lone figure traverses the atmospheric space. It begins with a wide view of the Gothic stone architecture, where vaulted ceilings loom over patrons seated at wooden tables under the glow of warm candlelight. As the scene unfolds, a woman in a green dress emerges from the background, weaving through the hall. She moves steadily toward the right foreground, passing between the furniture and the gathered guests before finally exiting the frame.
